productDisplayName: Spykar Men Free Wheeler Spirit Denim Blue Jeans
description: Composition Blue jeans with a washed and distressed look made of 98% cotton and 2% spandex, has two insert pockets on the front, two patch pockets on the back with embroidered detailing, brand patch appliqued on the waistband at the back and metal zipper and button closure on the front Fit Low waist, slim fit Wash care Wash and dry separately Wash inside out in mild detergent Do not bleach Dry under shade Use warm iron Look cool and casual in these washed blue denim jeans from spykar. The distressed look detailing goes well with the washed feel and low waist design of these denims. Team this pair with casual doodle tees or grunge tees for different looks. Model statistics The model wears jeans of length 41.5" Height: 6.1' Waist: 31"
